title: 10-Pack Fern, 15" Natural Dried Greenery with Stems for Wedding Garland Bouquet/Home Party/DIY Crafts Decors, Dried Plants [White]
features: [Multipurpose Use] - The real fern leaves in bulk are natural decorations for indoor or outdoor events such as wedding bouquets, wedding greenery, corsages, eucalyptus wreaths, homes, living rooms, gardens, farmhouse, or vase filler displays. Like other dried plants with stems, they can be used to DIY creative floral arrangements

[Natural Fern Plant] - Our dried fern plant is crafted from natural leaves using special preservation techniques. Unlike artificial fake ferns, we maintain the natural plant properties of real plants with reliable quality and fresh color, making them more appealing and realistic

[Size & Package] - The real green fern measures approximately 15.75 inches (40 cm), making it a good size for your decoration needs. You can also cut them according to your preference to create a unique decorative effect. Included: 10 x dried ferns

[Nice Symbol] - Dried fern leaves symbolizes honesty, and they are good for pairing with other dried flowers to create a more romantic atmosphere for a wedding or party. Dried greenery is good for making lovely dried flower bouquets, wedding centerpieces, or fillers for vintage rustic wedding bouquets

[Instructions] - Please do not water the dried plant, as the fern is dyed and watering may cause it to lose its previous color. Also, keep away from direct sunlight, as prolonged exposure may cause slight fading
description: PRODUCT APPLICATIONS Our dried fern has various applications. They can be used for wedding bouquets, wedding greenery, corsages, eucalyptus wreaths, homes, living rooms, gardens, farmhouse, or vase filler displays. Like other dried plants with stems, they can be used to DIY creative floral arrangements. PRODUCT DETAILS & INCLUDE √ Material: Fern √ Color: White √ Length Size: 15.75 inches (40 cm) √ Width Size: 7.87 inches (20 cm) √ Package Include: 10 Pcs x Dried Fern PRODUCT ADVANTAGES 1. Our dried fern plant is crafted from natural leaves using special preservation techniques. Unlike artificial fake ferns, we maintain the natural plant properties of real plants with reliable quality and fresh color, making them more appealing and realistic. 2. Dried fern leaves symbolizes honesty, and they are good for pairing with other dried flowers to create a more romantic atmosphere for a wedding or party. Dried greenery is good for making lovely dried flower bouquets, wedding centerpieces, or fillers for vintage rustic wedding bouquets. ATTENTION 1. Since long-distance transportation may cause the dried plants to wrinkle or fold, we recommend that you place them under books or other items to flatten them after receiving the product so that the dried plants can return to their previous posture. 2. Since the dried fern have been dyed, there may be slight discoloration and smell when they are first received. They can be placed in a cool and ventilated place for 2-3 days to dissipate the smell. 3. Please do not water the dried plant, as the fern is dyed and watering may cause it to lose its previous color. Also, keep away from direct sunlight, as prolonged exposure may cause slight fading.
